candidate: L22 VIOP BIST30 index-futures TERM-STRUCTURE (spot-free basis) -- index-timing predictor
mode: MEASUREMENT (real local VIOP archive; no network; no new fetch; committed-engine zero-touch; look-ahead-safe; ASCII).
thesis: Crystallizes the L18 index-basis avenue into a REAL measurement. The BIST30 index-futures term-structure slope (front vs next maturity) is the classic equity index-futures basis/carry signal. Hong-Yogo-type basis literature: a steep contango basis is associated with LOWER subsequent SPOT returns (negative predictive sign is the pre-registered thesis). Deploy form would be an index-timing overlay (long the index/future when the curve is cheap, flat/short when rich).
genuinely_new_axis: Derivatives TERM-STRUCTURE (futures curve shape). No prior L1-L21 track measured the futures curve. Categorically distinct from price/volume/fundamental/sentiment/short/foreign-flow/single-stock-OI axes. This is the last non-graveyard, offline-touchable axis on the agenda (the other remaining item, a broad fundamental-ratio sweep, is p-hacking and FF5 is already consumed by L14/L15/graveyard).

data_provenance.futures_leg_PRESENT: data/bist_datastore_archive/viop VIOP_GUNSONU_FIYATHACIM.M.YYYYMM.csv (semicolon, latin-1, 2 header rows). INF segment = BIST30 INDEX FUTURES (INSTRUMENT TYPE D_IX_FUT, CLASS DE_BIST30_FUT, UNDERLYING D_XU030D). Series code F_XU030MMYY (MM=expiry month, YY=year). col0=date, col1=series, col3=segment(INF), col7=SETTLEMENT PRICE, col19=trade volume, col21=open interest. Files span 2017-03..2026-05.
data_provenance.spot_leg_ABSENT_offline: A clean daily/weekly SPOT XU030 (BIST30 cash index) LEVEL is NOT available locally for the futures era (>=2017): (a) prices_official PP_GUNSONUFIYATHACIM carries a 'BIST 30 INDEX' column but the archive ENDS 2016-11 -> ZERO overlap with the futures; (b) prices_weekly PP_HAFTALIKOZET is a per-stock weekly OHLC xlsx with NO index-level column; (c) exposure has xu100 only (BIST100, the WRONG index for BIST30 futures), 2019+; (d) reconstructing the official divisor-based BIST30 level from adjusted_prices is float/divisor-error-prone and would inject basis error that swamps the signal. Verified by direct inspection at freeze time.

feasibility_PRECHECK.futures_curve: All 111 month-ends 2017-03..2026-05 carry >=2 listed F_XU030 maturities with positive settlement (median 4, min 3, max 4). Term-structure slope is computable EVERY month-end. FEASIBLE for the spot-free variant.
feasibility_PRECHECK.spot_basis_variant: DATA-BLOCKED offline (no clean spot XU030 level 2017-2026; see spot_leg_ABSENT_offline).
feasibility_PRECHECK.roll_down_confound_PRE_DECLARED: The spot-FREE variant (slope predicting the FUTURE's OWN forward return) is MECHANICALLY CONFOUNDED: a held deferred contract decays toward spot as days-to-expiry shrink, so its forward return contains a roll-down component ~= -slope*dt. High slope therefore mechanically implies a negative future-return component, manufacturing a spurious negative slope<->return relationship that is pure carry mechanics, NOT index-timing prediction. A CLEAN predictive test of the basis thesis requires the SPOT index return -- which is the leg that is data-blocked offline.

signal_FROZEN.curve: At each month-end m, order alive maturities by days-to-expiry (dte; expiry approximated as last calendar day of the F_XU030 MMYY month). F1 = front (smallest dte with dte >= MIN_DTE_DAYS). F2 = next maturity after F1.
signal_FROZEN.slope_annualized_log: slope(m) = ln(F2.settle / F1.settle) / ((F2.dte - F1.dte)/365.0). SINGLE pre-registered definition (no winsorization, no grid, no alternative normalization -> no multiple testing).
signal_FROZEN.future_forward_return_for_confound_demo: ret_F2(m) = F2(m).settle@month-end(m+1) / F2(m).settle@month-end(m) - 1, SAME contract (F2 alive at m+1 since dte>=~2mo). Look-ahead-safe (settlement is same-day public).
signal_FROZEN.clean_predictive_test_REQUIRES: ret_SPOT(m) = XU030_level(m+1)/XU030_level(m) - 1 -- NOT computable offline (spot leg absent).

design_FROZEN.look_ahead_safe: slope(m) uses end-of-day settlement known at day m; any forward return is strictly m -> m+1; any expanding-window statistic uses only data <= m.
what_will_be_MEASURED: Descriptive: annualized slope distribution (median/IQR), persistence, and (2019+) correlation with TLREF level to show the curve tracks the risk-free carry.

Roll-down-confound DEMONSTRATION: regress ret_F2 on slope (NW-t, lag 6) -> expect strongly negative; then show ret_F2 ~= -slope*dt identity (correlation of ret_F2 with the carry roll-down term near 1), proving the relationship is MECHANICAL not predictive.
Document the spot-basis data-block (clean predictive test not runnable offline).

keep_bar_FROZEN: A deployable index-timing edge would require: a CLEAN predictive test (slope -> SPOT return) with |NW-t| >= 2 AND regime-sign-stable AND a deploy rule beating buy-and-hold net of realistic futures cost. The clean test is NOT runnable offline (spot leg absent). The only offline-computable variant (slope -> FUTURE's own return) is mechanically confounded by roll-down and CANNOT establish an edge. Therefore the pre-registered outcome is VIOP-TS-FEASIBILITY-BLOCKED unless the measurement unexpectedly shows the futures curve carries clean, non-mechanical, regime-stable predictive content -- which is not expected.
two_sided_law: If (counter to expectation) some clean predictive signal appeared, only the pre-registered NEGATIVE sign (steep contango -> lower forward return) could count; an opposite-sign result would be an opposite-sign finding logged for a SEPARATE future pre-registered track, never claimed here (anti p-hacking).

honest_expectation.prior: WEAK (L18 already pre-declared weak; index-timing overlay, foreign-flow/D-211-adjacent).
honest_expectation.most_likely_verdict: VIOP-TS-FEASIBILITY-BLOCKED: the spot-free term-structure cannot yield a clean edge test (roll-down confound), and the clean spot-basis test is data-blocked offline. The descriptive measurement is expected to show the curve is in persistent steep contango that tracks the (huge, regime-shifting 2017-2026) Turkish risk-free rate -> the slope is dominated by carry, not sentiment.
honest_expectation.no_celebration: Result recorded whatever it is. No deploy claim. This rigorously CLOSES the VIOP index-basis axis that L18 left open, and documents a genuine non-negotiable offline data constraint (clean spot XU030 level absent), which is exactly the kind of block the autonomous mandate says to record.
